pi_items.source: setup_task.sh injects 'java.lang.NullPointerException' into one of the issue descriptions
Task instructions ask to mark duplicate issues as 'Rejected', and verifier checks for status 'rejected'.
Task instructions ask to keep Master issue 'New' or 'Open', setup script assigns status_new, and verifier accepts 'new'.
Redmine IssueRelation model uses 'duplicates' as the internal string for the relation type.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Redmine project with identifier 'mobile-app-beta'. The master issue is identifiable by the presence of the keyword 'NullPointerException' in its description. Duplicate issues are expected to be marked with the status 'Rejected', while the master issue remains 'New'. The duplicate issues must be linked to the master issue using the Redmine relation type 'duplicates'.
